scope.summary: Dedup: duplicate of oraclemcp-eng-program-bp8ia.7.11.13 (DB4 signed INTERVAL DAY TO SECOND formatting) for the open overlap; the BOOLEAN-fidelity remainder is covered by deferred bead oraclemcp-h-server-db-type-fidelity-tstz-vector-q289u.
